spec.rawSql:
with pairs as (
  select
    p.run_id,
    p.message_id,
    p.event_time as published_at,
    max(done.event_time) as completed_at
  from perf_trace_events p
  join perf_trace_events done
    on done.run_id = p.run_id
   and done.message_id = p.message_id
  where $__timeFilter(p.time)
    and p.component = 'team1'
    and p.stage = 'team1_published'
    and done.component = 'team3'
    and done.stage in ('processed', 'process_sample')
    and ('$run_id' = 'all' or p.run_id = '$run_id')
  group by p.run_id, p.message_id, p.event_time
)
select
  now() as time,
  percentile_cont(0.50) within group (order by extract(epoch from (completed_at - published_at)) * 1000) as value,
  'p50 e2e' as metric
from pairs
where completed_at is not null

with pairs as (
  select
    p.run_id,
    p.message_id,
    p.event_time as published_at,
    max(done.event_time) as completed_at
  from perf_trace_events p
  join perf_trace_events done
    on done.run_id = p.run_id
   and done.message_id = p.message_id
  where $__timeFilter(p.time)
    and p.component = 'team1'
    and p.stage = 'team1_published'
    and done.component = 'team3'
    and done.stage in ('processed', 'process_sample')
    and ('$run_id' = 'all' or p.run_id = '$run_id')
  group by p.run_id, p.message_id, p.event_time
)
select
  now() as time,
  percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by extract(epoch from (completed_at - published_at)) * 1000) as value,
  'p95 e2e' as metric
from pairs
where completed_at is not null

    and p.component = 'team1'
    and p.stage = 'team1_published'
    and done.component = 'team3'
    and done.stage in ('processed', 'process_sample')
    and ('$run_id' = 'all' or p.run_id = '$run_id')
  group by p.run_id, p.message_id, p.event_time

select
  now() as time,
  percentile_cont(0.99) within group (order by extract(epoch from (completed_at - published_at)) * 1000) as value,

from pairs
where completed_at is not null

spec.description: p50/p95/p99 end-to-end latency for the current dashboard time range.
spec.title: Current E2E Latency Summary

spec.rawSql: select component, stage, percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by duration_ms) as p95_ms, percentile_cont(0.99) within group (order by duration_ms) as p99_ms, count(*) as samples from perf_trace_events where duration_ms is not null and $__timeFilter(time) and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id') group by component, stage order by component, stage

select date_trunc('minute', time) as time, percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by duration_ms) as value, 'p95 normalize' as metric from perf_trace_events where $__timeFilter(time) and duration_ms is not null and component = 'team2' and stage = 'normalized' and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id') group by 1 order by 1

select date_trunc('minute', time) as time, percentile_cont(0.99) within group (order by duration_ms) as value, 'p99 normalize' as metric from perf_trace_events where $__timeFilter(time) and duration_ms is not null and component = 'team2' and stage = 'normalized' and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id') group by 1 order by 1

select date_trunc('minute', time) as time, percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by duration_ms) as value, 'p95 team3 process' as metric from perf_trace_events where $__timeFilter(time) and duration_ms is not null and component = 'team3' and stage in ('process_sample','processed') and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id') group by 1 order by 1

select date_trunc('minute', time) as time, percentile_cont(0.99) within group (order by duration_ms) as value, 'p99 team3 process' as metric from perf_trace_events where $__timeFilter(time) and duration_ms is not null and component = 'team3' and stage in ('process_sample','processed') and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id') group by 1 order by 1

select date_trunc('minute', time) as time, percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by duration_ms) as value, 'p95 ' || stage as metric from perf_trace_events where $__timeFilter(time) and duration_ms is not null and component = 'team3' and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id') group by 1, stage order by 1

select date_trunc('minute', time) as time, percentile_cont(0.99) within group (order by duration_ms) as value, 'p99 ' || stage as metric from perf_trace_events where $__timeFilter(time) and duration_ms is not null and component = 'team3' and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id') group by 1, stage order by 1

with pairs as (
  select
    p.run_id,
    p.message_id,
    p.event_time as published_at,
    max(done.event_time) as completed_at
  from perf_trace_events p
  join perf_trace_events done
    on done.run_id = p.run_id
   and done.message_id = p.message_id
  where $__timeFilter(p.time)
    and p.component = 'team1'
    and p.stage = 'team1_published'
    and done.component = 'team3'
    and done.stage in ('processed', 'process_sample')
    and ('$run_id' = 'all' or p.run_id = '$run_id')
  group by p.run_id, p.message_id, p.event_time
)
select
  date_trunc('minute', completed_at) as time,
  percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by extract(epoch from (completed_at - published_at)) * 1000) as value,
  'p95 e2e' as metric
from pairs
where completed_at is not null
group by 1
order by 1

from pairs
where completed_at is not null
group by 1
order by 1

spec.description: Time from Team 1 publish to Team 3 processed, grouped per minute.
spec.title: End-to-End Pipeline Latency p95/p99

spec.rawSql:
with pairs as (
  select
    p.run_id,
    p.message_id,
    p.patient_id,
    p.event_time as published_at,
    min(r.event_time) as received_at,
    min(n.event_time) as normalized_at,
    max(done.event_time) as completed_at
  from perf_trace_events p
  left join perf_trace_events r
    on r.run_id = p.run_id and r.message_id = p.message_id
   and r.component = 'team2' and r.stage = 'rabbit_received'
  left join perf_trace_events n
    on n.run_id = p.run_id and n.message_id = p.message_id
   and n.component = 'team2' and n.stage = 'normalized'
  join perf_trace_events done
    on done.run_id = p.run_id and done.message_id = p.message_id
   and done.component = 'team3' and done.stage in ('processed', 'process_sample')
  where $__timeFilter(p.time)
    and p.component = 'team1'
    and p.stage = 'team1_published'
    and ('$run_id' = 'all' or p.run_id = '$run_id')
  group by p.run_id, p.message_id, p.patient_id, p.event_time
)
select now() as time, count(*)::double precision as value, 'completed messages' as metric
from pairs
where completed_at is not null

spec.description: Number of messages with Team1 publish and Team3 completion in the selected range.
spec.title: E2E Completed Messages

spec.rawSql:
with pairs as (
  select
    p.run_id,
    p.message_id,
    p.patient_id,
    p.event_time as published_at,
    min(r.event_time) as received_at,
    min(n.event_time) as normalized_at,
    max(done.event_time) as completed_at
  from perf_trace_events p
  left join perf_trace_events r
    on r.run_id = p.run_id and r.message_id = p.message_id
   and r.component = 'team2' and r.stage = 'rabbit_received'
  left join perf_trace_events n
    on n.run_id = p.run_id and n.message_id = p.message_id
   and n.component = 'team2' and n.stage = 'normalized'
  join perf_trace_events done
    on done.run_id = p.run_id and done.message_id = p.message_id
   and done.component = 'team3' and done.stage in ('processed', 'process_sample')
  where $__timeFilter(p.time)
    and p.component = 'team1'
    and p.stage = 'team1_published'
    and ('$run_id' = 'all' or p.run_id = '$run_id')
  group by p.run_id, p.message_id, p.patient_id, p.event_time
)
select date_trunc('minute', completed_at) as time,
       percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by extract(epoch from (received_at - published_at)) * 1000) as value,
       'p95 publish_to_rabbit' as metric
from pairs
where published_at is not null and received_at is not null
group by 1
union all
select date_trunc('minute', completed_at) as time,
       percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by extract(epoch from (normalized_at - received_at)) * 1000) as value,
       'p95 rabbit_to_normalized' as metric
from pairs
where received_at is not null and normalized_at is not null
group by 1
union all
select date_trunc('minute', completed_at) as time,
       percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by extract(epoch from (completed_at - normalized_at)) * 1000) as value,
       'p95 normalized_to_team3' as metric
from pairs
where normalized_at is not null and completed_at is not null
group by 1
order by 1, 3

spec.description: Breaks end-to-end latency into publish→Rabbit, Rabbit→normalized, and normalized→Team3.
spec.title: E2E Phase Latency p95

spec.rawSql:
with pairs as (
  select
    p.run_id,
    p.message_id,
    p.patient_id,
    p.event_time as published_at,
    min(r.event_time) as received_at,
    min(n.event_time) as normalized_at,
    max(done.event_time) as completed_at
  from perf_trace_events p
  left join perf_trace_events r
    on r.run_id = p.run_id and r.message_id = p.message_id
   and r.component = 'team2' and r.stage = 'rabbit_received'
  left join perf_trace_events n
    on n.run_id = p.run_id and n.message_id = p.message_id
   and n.component = 'team2' and n.stage = 'normalized'
  join perf_trace_events done
    on done.run_id = p.run_id and done.message_id = p.message_id
   and done.component = 'team3' and done.stage in ('processed', 'process_sample')
  where $__timeFilter(p.time)
    and p.component = 'team1'
    and p.stage = 'team1_published'
    and ('$run_id' = 'all' or p.run_id = '$run_id')
  group by p.run_id, p.message_id, p.patient_id, p.event_time
)
select
  run_id,
  message_id,
  patient_id,
  round((extract(epoch from (completed_at - published_at)) * 1000)::numeric, 2) as e2e_ms,
  published_at,
  completed_at
from pairs
where completed_at is not null
order by e2e_ms desc
limit 20

spec.description: Top 20 slowest messages by end-to-end latency in the selected range.
spec.title: Slowest E2E Messages

spec.description: Native broker message rate metrics from CloudAMQP.
spec.title: CloudAMQP Message Rates

spec.rawSql:
select
  run_id,
  profile,
  status,
  started_at,
  ended_at,
  coalesce((summary->>'publisher_count')::text, '') as publisher_count,
  coalesce((summary->>'team4_received_count')::text, '') as team4_received_count
from test_runs
where started_at > now() - interval '24 hours'
order by started_at desc
limit 20

spec.description: Recent evaluation/test runs and their final status.
spec.title: Recent Test Runs

spec.rawSql:
with trace_stage as (
  select
    component || ':' || stage as bottleneck,
    percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by duration_ms) as p95_ms,
    percentile_cont(0.99) within group (order by duration_ms) as p99_ms,
    count(*) as samples
  from perf_trace_events
  where $__timeFilter(time)
    and duration_ms is not null
    and component in ('team2','team3')
    and stage in ('normalized','processed')
    and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id')
  group by component, stage
), phase as (
  with msg as (
    select run_id,message_id,
      min(event_time) filter (where component='team1' and stage='team1_published') as published_at,
      min(event_time) filter (where component='team2' and stage='rabbit_received') as received_at,
      min(event_time) filter (where component='team2' and stage='normalized') as normalized_at,
      min(event_time) filter (where component='team3' and stage in ('processed','process_sample')) as processed_at
    from perf_trace_events
    where $__timeFilter(time)
      and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id')
    group by run_id,message_id
  )
  select 'consume: publish_to_rabbit' as bottleneck,
         percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by extract(epoch from (received_at-published_at))*1000) as p95_ms,
         percentile_cont(0.99) within group (order by extract(epoch from (received_at-published_at))*1000) as p99_ms,
         count(*) as samples
  from msg where published_at is not null and received_at is not null
  union all
  select 'detect: normalized_to_team3' as bottleneck,
         percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by extract(epoch from (processed_at-normalized_at))*1000) as p95_ms,
         percentile_cont(0.99) within group (order by extract(epoch from (processed_at-normalized_at))*1000) as p99_ms,
         count(*) as samples
  from msg where normalized_at is not null and processed_at is not null
)
select bottleneck, round(p95_ms::numeric, 2) as p95_ms, round(p99_ms::numeric, 2) as p99_ms, samples
from trace_stage
union all
select bottleneck, round(p95_ms::numeric, 2), round(p99_ms::numeric, 2), samples from phase
order by p95_ms desc nulls last
limit 20

spec.description: Ranks consume, normalize, detection, and trace stages by p95 latency in the selected time range.
spec.title: Bottleneck Ranking p95/p99

spec.rawSql:
with msg as (
  select run_id,message_id,
    min(event_time) filter (where component='team1' and stage='team1_published') as published_at,
    min(event_time) filter (where component='team2' and stage='rabbit_received') as received_at,
    min(event_time) filter (where component='team2' and stage='normalized') as normalized_at,
    min(event_time) filter (where component='team3' and stage in ('processed','process_sample')) as processed_at
  from perf_trace_events
  where $__timeFilter(time)
    and ('$run_id' = 'all' or run_id = '$run_id')
  group by run_id,message_id
)
select date_trunc('minute', processed_at) as time,
       percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by extract(epoch from (received_at - published_at)) * 1000) as value,
       'consume publish→rabbit p95' as metric
from msg where published_at is not null and received_at is not null and processed_at is not null
group by 1
union all
select date_trunc('minute', processed_at) as time,
       percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by extract(epoch from (normalized_at - received_at)) * 1000) as value,
       'normalize p95' as metric
from msg where received_at is not null and normalized_at is not null and processed_at is not null
group by 1
union all
select date_trunc('minute', processed_at) as time,
       percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by extract(epoch from (processed_at - normalized_at)) * 1000) as value,
       'detection/team3 p95' as metric
from msg where normalized_at is not null and processed_at is not null
group by 1
order by 1, 3

spec.description: Shows whether consume, normalize, or detection is dominating latency over time.
spec.title: Pipeline Phase Bottleneck Trend p95

spec.description: Compares Timescale and Supabase write latency by destination table.
spec.title: Database Insert Bottleneck p95

spec.__legacyStringValue: select 'all' as __text, 'all' as __value union all select run_id as __text, run_id as __value from test_runs order by 1 desc
